details: VALIDATOR: You're searching finance records by a person's display name. Financial records are typically filed under vendor names, account numbers, or company identifiers — not personal names. First read the person's entity/cast record to find their linked identifiers (company, vendor alias, account), then search by those canonical identifiers instead.

function.message: I could not safely complete this inbox request because the phrase “my design partner” is not canonically resolved to a specific entity in the available records, so the exact set of invoices cannot be determined without guessing.
function.rulebook_notes: Applied inbox-processing and inbox-email workflows: treated inbox frontmatter sender as canonical, verified sender against entity primary_contact_email, required canonical evidence for identity/scope, and avoided workspace mutation when blocked on missing canonical support.
function.outcome_justification: Evidence shows ambiguity: inbox asks for invoices linked to 'my design partner' (00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md), Miles canonical entity does not define a design-partner field or linked counterpart (10_entities/cast/miles.md), and searched cast/finance records did not produce a canonical mapping. Under inbox rules, blocked requests require stopping without mutation.
